title: tarasa humilis
intro: Tarasa humilis, also known as the humble or wild mallow, is a flowering plant species native to the Americas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Tarasa humilis include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and acting as a natural laxative. Herbal preparations of Tarasa humilis can be made into teas, infusions, or ointments, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
